title: Fiery Hearty Australian Eggplant Gratin
description: A rich and spicy vegetarian Australian-inspired eggplant gratin, perfect for a quick weeknight dinner.
instructions: Cut the eggplant into 1 cm (1/2 inch) thick slices.
Brush both sides of the eggplant slices with olive oil and season with salt.
Sauté the onion in butter until softened, then add minced garlic and cook for another minute.
In a separate bowl, combine ferment jang, red chilli flakes, and chopped rosemary.
Spread a layer of the onion mixture in the bottom of a baking dish, followed by a layer of eggplant slices.
Sprinkle a quarter of the ferment jang mixture over the eggplant, then repeat the layers two more times.
Top with grated cheese (if using) and bake for 35-40 minutes, or until golden brown.
Remove from oven and let cool for 10-15 minutes before serving.
Serve hot, garnished with additional rosemary if desired.
